signals.last_msg_before: Hi David! Since we haven't heard back from you, we'll go ahead and close this request. Your refund of $249 has been processed and should reflect within 3 to 7 business days. Feel free to reach out anytime if you need anything else!

cause_analysis.narrative: 4d Bliss churned on 2026-04-25 after 195 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-02-13 via app_chat — 71 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 71 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

As a standard procedure, I will be forwarding your request to the concerned team, they will connect with you for 15min over a Phone call to verify a few details before cancelling.   Are you available for a quick chat…

I am not overly comcerned with your procedures. I Dont need to talk to anyone further. I have made a firm business decision.   Please honor your position as a business connection, and cancel our agreement, confirming that I wont be charged for April.   Namaste, David

I was able to follow up this morning theough your app with Grant, a lead that cane through last night. I hope to have him schedule.

I also updated my request for the booking link. My preference is that leads are sent to my direct booking link https://4dbliss.com/book-appointment, and are not requested to call.
